Flow.description: Update to Account Information flow to focus more on Contacts and there roles rather than the Account
Flow.label: Contact Updates for Application

recordLookups.name: Get_Related_Contacts_with_Matching_Email
recordLookups.label: Get Related Contacts with Matching Email

fields.name: Is_firm_a_certified_Women_owned_Business_Enterprise_WBE
fields.fieldText: Is firm a certified Women-owned Business Enterprise (WBE)?

fields.name: Is_firm_a_certified_Minority_owned_Business_Enterprise_MBE
fields.fieldText: Is firm a certified Minority-owned Business Enterprise (MBE)?

fields.name: Is_the_Entity_a_neighborhood_association
fields.fieldText: Is the Entity a neighborhood association?

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a valid nine-digit number
Please enter a valid 12-character, alphanumeric value

fields.name: dt_SAMgovURL
fields.fieldText: If you do not have a Unique Entity ID, navigate to SAM.gov to register.

fields.name: If_Non_profit_If_yes_is_the_non_profit_designation_registered_with_the_State
fields.fieldText: If Non-profit: If yes, is the non-profit designation registered with the State of Missouri?

fields.name: Has_a_non_profit_determination_been_made_by_the_Internal_Revenue_Service
fields.fieldText: Has a non-profit determination been made by the Internal Revenue Service?

fields.name: If_yes_indicate_your_Internal_Revenue_Code_designation
fields.fieldText: If yes, indicate your Internal Revenue Code designation:

fields.name: Is_fostering_low_income_housing_listed_among_the_nonprofit_s_purposes_in_Article
fields.fieldText: Is "fostering low-income housing" listed among the nonprofit's purposes in Articles of Incorporation and/or By-Laws?

fields.name: Explain_the_role_and_activities_of_the_non_profit_sponsor_in_the_project
fields.fieldText: If acting as a non-profit sponsor of this project in connection with other applicants, please explain the role and activities of the non-profit sponsor in the project

fields.name: Will_development_be_owned_or_sponsored_by_a_Community_Based_Development_Organiza
fields.fieldText: Will development be owned or sponsored by a Community Based Development Organization (CBDO)?

fields.name: Is_the_CBDO_designation_from_CDA
fields.fieldText: Is the CBDO designation from CDA?

fields.name: Will_development_be_owned_or_sponsored_by_a_Community_Housing_Development_Organi
fields.fieldText: Will development be owned or sponsored by a Community Housing Development Organization (CHDO)?

fields.name: Is_the_CHDO_designation_from_CDA
fields.fieldText: Is the CHDO designation from CDA?

fields.name: dt_EditContacts
fields.fieldText: To make changes to the information below: select a contact from the table and press Edit Contact. (the button will appear upon selection)

fields.name: dt_ApplicationLocked
fields.fieldText: At this time the application has already been submitted. Account and contact information are VIEW ONLY.

value.stringValue: Is firm a certified Women-owned Business Enterprise (WBE)?
Is firm a certified Minority-owned Business Enterprise (MBE)?
Is the Entity a neighborhood association?

fields.name: dt_SAMgovURL_0
fields.fieldText: If you do not have a Unique Entity ID, navigate to SAM.gov to register.

value.stringValue: If Non-profit: If yes, is the non-profit designation registered with the State of Missouri?
Has a non-profit determination been made by the Internal Revenue Service?
If yes, indicate your Internal Revenue Code designation:
Is "fostering low-income housing" listed among the nonprofit's purposes in Articles of Incorporation and/or By-Laws?
If acting as a non-profit sponsor of this project in connection with other applicants, please explain the role and activities of the non-profit sponsor in the project
Will development be owned or sponsored by a Community Based Development Organization (CBDO)?
Is the CBDO designation from CDA?
Will development be owned or sponsored by a Community Housing Development Organization (CHDO)?
Is the CHDO designation from CDA?

screens.name: Contacts_Already_Exist_with_that_Email
screens.label: Contacts Already Exist with that Email

fields.name: contacts_already_exist_navigate_back_dt
fields.fieldText:
A contact already exists under this account with that email. Please navigate back to the account screen and make any necessary edits in the contacts table.


If you want to still create a brand new contact, click previous and make sure you use a different email.

fields.name: dt_RoleConditionalInfo_0
fields.fieldText: For Partners and Owners, enter the fields below

fields.name: dt_RoleConditionalInfo
fields.fieldText: For Partners and Owners, enter the fields below

fields.name: No_Account_Found
fields.fieldText: There is no account related to this application. Please contact support to revolve the issue.

fields.name: No_Contact_Found
fields.fieldText: There is no contact related to this application. Please contact support to revolve the issue.
